recommendation_map.S1: Allow indexing; remove noindex from robots meta if appropriate.
recommendation_map.S2: Add a canonical link tag pointing to the preferred URL.
recommendation_map.S3: Set canonical URL to this page's URL (self-referencing canonical).
recommendation_map.S4: Add hreflang tags for multi-language or regional variants.
recommendation_map.S5: Ensure robots meta does not block indexing (no noindex).
recommendation_map.S6: Add at least one H1 heading to the page.
recommendation_map.S7: Use exactly one H1 per page for clear topical focus.
recommendation_map.S8: Keep title tag between 50 and 60 characters for search snippets.
recommendation_map.S9: Keep meta description between 120 and 160 characters.
recommendation_map.S10: Add a unique meta description for the page.
recommendation_map.S11: Increase word count to at least 300 words of substantive content.
recommendation_map.S12: Complete product attributes (material, size, brand, etc.) for relevance.
recommendation_map.S13: Add content that answers common search queries (Q&A, specs).
recommendation_map.S14: Add internal links to related pages (at least 3).
recommendation_map.S15: Add at least one relevant external link to authoritative sources.
recommendation_map.S16: Add descriptive alt text to all images.
